from opentelemetry import trace

tracer = trace.get_tracer(__name__)

def process_order(order_id: int, user_email: str, user_phone: str, ip_address: str) -> dict:
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("process_order") as span:
        span.set_attribute("order_id", order_id)
        span.set_attribute("user_email", user_email)
        span.set_attribute("user_phone", user_phone)
        span.set_attribute("ip_address", ip_address)
        return {"status": "processed"}

def handle_login(email: str, password: str, ip: str) -> dict:
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("login") as span:
        span.set_attribute("email", email)
        span.set_attribute("ip_address", ip)
        return {"token": "abc123"}

def create_profile(name: str, ssn: str, credit_card: str) -> dict:
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("create_profile") as span:
        span.set_attribute("name", name)
        span.set_attribute("ssn", ssn)
        span.set_attribute("credit_card", credit_card)
        return {"profile_id": 1}
